notes: The skill's main advantage is the interactive resolution workflow (Step 5) — both baselines missed this entirely, while all 3 with-skill runs included it
Detection of contradictions is comparable: Claude catches most issues without the skill. The skill missed the free-tier project limit in eval 1.
The skill adds ~16s and ~3.2k tokens compared to baseline — modest overhead for structured output and resolution workflow
Clean docs test (eval 2) shows no difference: both configurations correctly report no contradictions and avoid fabrication
The skill's structured table format (with severity) is more consistent than the baseline's varying formats
